rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption has no relationship to Educ. Code §38.036, which governs trauma-informed care policies for school districts. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Each school district shall adopt and implement a policy requiring the integration of trauma-informed practices in each school environment.
_note: No conflict; the rule text addresses school district trauma-informed care policy and is unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
